notes: Every wff has exactly one outermost form: existence from the formation rules (def:well-formed-formula), uniqueness from the cases being disjoint (lem:constructor-disjointness) and the constructors injective (lem:constructor-injectivity). All three load-bearing and present -- the correctly-wired lynchpin of the syntax layer. Its dep set confirms the 0124 cycle fix (it sits ABOVE constructor-disjointness).
